error_codes.rpc_error: Failed to connect to any provided RPC nodes.
error_codes.insufficient_funds: Wallet lacks USDC or ETH for gas.
error_codes.amount_too_low: Payment amount is below the protocol minimum (1000).
error_codes.token_not_accepted: The provided token address is not in the whitelist.
error_codes.duplicate_transaction: This transaction hash has already been consumed.
error_codes.invalid_receipt: The provided receipt (TxHash) is malformed or invalid.
error_codes.wrong_contract: Payment event was not emitted by the official PayNode contract.
error_codes.order_mismatch: OrderId in receipt does not match requested ID.
error_codes.missing_receipt: Please pay to PayNode contract and provide 'PAYMENT-SIGNATURE' header.
